name: @openuidev/browser-bundle
description: Prebuilt IIFE browser bundle of @openuidev/react-lang + @openuidev/react-ui for iframe, CDN, and no-build-pipeline embedding (Open WebUI tools, chatbots, widgets, etc.)

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && esbuild src/entry.js --bundle --format=iife --minify --outfile=dist/openui-bundle.min.js '--define:process.env.NODE_ENV="production"' --target=es2020 && node scripts/concat-css.mjs
scripts.typecheck: echo "(no types to check — IIFE bundle)"
scripts.ci: pnpm run lint:check && pnpm run format:check

author: engineering@thesys.dev
